query: SELECT receipt_no, status, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.remark')) as remark, CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.principal_paid') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) as principal_paid, CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.bad_debt_amount') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) as bad_debt_amount, CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.total_paid_amount') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) as total_paid_amount FROM payment_transactions WHERE section = 'Boonphone' AND CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.bad_debt_amount') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) > 0 LIMIT 5
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute SELECT receipt_no, status, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.remark')) as remark, CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.principal_paid') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) as principal_paid, CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.bad_debt_amount') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) as bad_debt_amount, CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.total_paid_amount') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) as total_paid_amount FROM payment_transactions WHERE section = 'Boonphone' AND CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.bad_debt_amount') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) > 0 LIMIT 5
